monitors.name: databaes.net
monitors.notes: Primary public front door. If this fails, treat it as an internet-reachability incident.

monitors.name: signup.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Anonymous public page with separate deploy path from the landing page.

monitors.name: auth.databaes.net
monitors.notes: SSO front door. Critical because it gates most protected apps.

monitors.name: ops.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Behind SSO. Add a dedicated probe endpoint plus Vault-backed token before enabling.

monitors.name: wikijs.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Behind SSO. Add a dedicated probe endpoint plus Vault-backed token before enabling.

monitors.name: grafana.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Behind SSO. Add a dedicated probe endpoint plus Vault-backed token before enabling.

monitors.name: tomajflix.app
monitors.notes: Behind SSO. Add a dedicated probe endpoint plus Vault-backed token before enabling.
